cxu_object.claim: The technical signal provides multi-timeframe regime-aware projections using ADX for trend strength, RSI for overbought-oversold, Bollinger Bands for range position, and EMA crossovers for trend direction, and its key differentiator is the regimeByHorizon metadata which classifies each horizon independently as trending, mean-reverting, or transitioning

supporting_contexts.text: Technical signal combines ADX (trend strength), RSI (momentum extremes), Bollinger Band position (range location), and EMA alignment (trend direction). Direction is ADX-weighted — when ADX is high the signal follows trend, when ADX is low it favors mean reversion. This makes it regime-adaptive at the signal level.

Key metadata: regimeByHorizon (object mapping each horizon to trending/mean_reverting/transition), alignmentScore (how well indicators agree), indicatorReadiness (data sufficiency per indicator). The regimeByHorizon field is particularly valuable — it provides per-horizon regime classification that can confirm or contradict the trader bot's own regime classifier.

primaryHorizon.description: Most reliable horizon for this signal type

trustLevel.description: Current trust level based on observed accuracy

version.change_description: Initial signal type CxU from technical signal spec
